scope.claim_limit: Synchronized LiDAR-IMU odometry check on a public HDL-400 open sequence; validates IMU-gated compensation / prior paths but does not by itself promote methods to full LIO T0 without broader coverage.

protocol.seed: first-pose anchor, --no-gt-seed velocity prediction after frame 0
protocol.imu_off_command: Run the same command on a temporary PCD tree without imu.csv (see runner); output -> docs/benchmarks/lio_imu_public/hdl_400_imu_off.json

imu_on.note: Directional-degeneracy LiDAR-IMU scan-to-submap (first-pose anchored; adaptive per-point outlier gate + IMU-prior degeneracy regularization). deg_dirs/frame rot=0 trans=0

imu_off.note: Scan-to-submap, constant-velocity fallback (no imu.csv; first-pose anchored; degeneracy prior diagnostics-only). deg_dirs/frame rot=0 trans=0

imu_on.note: Degeneracy-factor sensing (condition number) + adaptive MAD-outlier detection + IMU/LiDAR fusion compensation (first-pose anchored). degenerate_frames=16

imu_off.note: Degeneracy sensing, constant-velocity fallback (no imu.csv; first-pose anchored; compensation diagnostics-only). degenerate_frames=16

imu_on.note: Indexed-point dynamic LIO: pseudo-occupancy dynamic detection, delayed removal, and IMU gyro prior. dynamic/frame=356.891667 corr/frame=3676.341667 removed_sum/frame=2505.283333

imu_off.note: Indexed-point dynamic scan-to-map: pseudo-occupancy dynamic detection and delayed removal; no imu.csv so constant-velocity fallback. dynamic/frame=349.775000 corr/frame=3673.975000 removed_sum/frame=2580.808333

imu_on.note: RF-LIO removal-first LIO: adaptive multi-resolution range-image foreground removal before indexed dynamic LIO, with IMU gyro prior. removal_first/frame=299.816667 candidates/frame=299.816667 kept/frame=6700.183333 backend_dynamic/frame=276.908333 corr/frame=3412.866667 backend_removed_sum/frame=17805.241667

imu_off.note: RF-LIO removal-first scan-to-map: adaptive multi-resolution range-image foreground removal before indexed dynamic scan-to-map; no imu.csv so constant-velocity fallback. removal_first/frame=301.658333 candidates/frame=301.658333 kept/frame=6698.341667 backend_dynamic/frame=252.175000 corr/frame=3415.950000 backend_removed_sum/frame=16518.691667

imu_on.note: Direct LiDAR-inertial odometry: GICP scan-to-map plus IMU preintegration prior between scans when imu.csv and per-frame timestamps align; otherwise LiDAR motion prior only (no GT seed).

imu_off.note: Direct LiDAR-inertial odometry: GICP scan-to-map plus IMU preintegration prior between scans when imu.csv and per-frame timestamps align; otherwise LiDAR motion prior only (no GT seed).

conclusion: On HDL-400 open LiDAR-IMU 120-frame window (120 frames, 24658 IMU samples), IMU-gated paths activate for D2-LIO (True), DegenSense (True), ID-LIO (True), and RF-LIO (True). D2-LIO RPE 1.584% with IMU vs 1.518% without; DegenSense 1.716% vs 1.599%. LiDAR-IBA IMU residuals are not wired in pcd_dogfooding yet — BA-on/off KITTI ablation remains the committed IMU-free evidence. This closes the synchronized LiDAR-IMU validation gap for compensation and prior paths at T1 mechanism level, not full manuscript LIO claims.
